label: RepoStewardAgent
description: Meta-governance owner for repo boundaries, small changes, no auto-merge/auto-run, dependency restraint, and ontology integrity.

label: QMLResearcherAgent
description: Researches QML concepts, papers, official docs and frameworks with uncertainty and implementation relevance.

label: QMLArchitectAgent
description: Designs QML experiment architecture, feature maps, ansatz choices, backend choices and extension points.

label: ClassicalBaselineEngineer
description: Creates baseline-first ML comparisons and protects against QML hype by requiring strong classical baselines.

label: ExperimentEngineer
description: Implements runnable scripts, small examples, graceful import errors and minimal dependency code changes.

label: EvaluatorAgent
description: Compares models under controlled conditions and checks leakage, metrics, splits and reproducibility.

label: EthicsClaimsReviewer
description: Prevents unsupported quantum advantage claims, enforces limitations and aligns language to evidence.

label: DocumentationAgent
description: Maintains README, docs, model/dataset cards, comparison reports and agent-facing explanations.

label: ContributionReviewerAgent
description: Scores contributions using rubric, reviews packets, updates reputation guidance and contribution log.

label: TaskBoardCuratorAgent
description: Maintains task board, next-agent instructions, task protocols and safe task proposal workflow.

label: SchemaGuardianAgent
description: Maintains schemas, validation script, benchmark result fixtures and machine-readable contract integrity.

label: MCPInterfaceAgent
description: Maintains local command interface without enabling expensive or uncontrolled automation.

label: SecuritySafetyAgent
description: Reviews secrets, automation boundaries, external calls, dependency additions and uncontrolled agent loops.

label: ClassicalBaselineRequired
description: Every QML experiment must include a classical baseline.

label: LimitationsRequired
description: Every result must include limitations.

label: ClaimsMatchEvidence
description: Every claim must match the evidence; weaken any claim stronger than the data.

label: MetadataRequired
description: Every experiment records dataset, model, backend, seed, metrics and environment.

label: QMLMetadataRequired
description: Every QML model reports qubits, circuit depth if available, shots if applicable, and backend/simulator.

label: SmallReadableExamples
description: Prefer small readable examples over complex abstractions.

label: MinimalDependencies
description: Do not add large dependencies without explicit justification.

label: TargetedChanges
description: Do not rewrite the whole repo when a targeted change is sufficient.

label: NoUncontrolledAutomation
description: Do not enable automatic benchmark execution, auto-merge, or uncontrolled agent loops without explicit human approval.

label: NewContributor
description: Contributor arrives -> reads instructions -> chooses task -> creates packet -> validates -> PR -> review -> contribution log.

label: DefaultExperiment
description: Plan -> dataset card -> classical baseline -> QML candidate -> manual evaluation -> comparison report -> model card -> ethics review -> next steps.

label: Validation
description: Run benchmarks/runner.py, mcp/server.py get_results, and scripts/validate_repo.py as appropriate.

label: Review
description: Review contribution packet, baseline integrity, claim status, validation commands, limitations and rubric score.

label: UnsupportedQuantumAdvantageClaims
description: Claims exceed evidence, especially from small datasets or toy fixtures.

label: MissingClassicalBaseline
description: QML result lacks comparable classical baseline.

label: BenchmarkGaming
description: Optimizing reported score without preserving scientific value or reproducibility.

label: DependencySprawl
description: Adding heavy frameworks or build systems without clear justification.

label: UncontrolledAgentLoops
description: Agents auto-generate, auto-run, auto-merge or mutate board/state without approval.

label: LargeUnreviewedRewrite
description: Broad rewrite reduces auditability and maintainability.

label: BaselineIntegrity
description: Classical baseline present, comparable and strong enough for claim context.

label: Reproducibility
description: Dataset, split, seed, metrics, backend and environment recorded.

label: ClaimDiscipline
description: Claim status and prose match recorded result and limitations.

label: SmallChange
description: Change is small, reversible and auditable.

label: Validation
description: Benchmark runner/MCP/validate_repo checks run where relevant.

label: HumanApproval
description: Auto-run/auto-merge/uncontrolled loops require explicit human approval.
